name: Rutik Bhosle
content: Rahul is a rare operations leader who combines deep technical understanding with executive strategic vision. He designed and implemented accountability systems that transformed our delivery capacity, resulting in a consistent 98.5% SLA rate and a highly motivated team.

name: Evelyn Carter
content: Under Rahul's operations management, Star Prime transitioned from manual spreadsheet-heavy tasks to the Star Prime AI OS. His leadership has streamlined our publication process, reduced editorial overhead by 70%, and enabled us to scale our media coverage.

name: Ajay Rathod
content: Working under Rahul's leadership during our scaling initiatives, I saw first-hand how he manages to motivate teams while maintaining high performance. His focus on operations excellence and personal branding is inspiring.

name: Ananya Joshi
content: Rahul's consultative approach to AI workflow automation helped us overhaul our client communication system. The custom dashboards he outlined saved our team over 10 hours a week and made our project execution completely transparent.

name: Swapnil Deshmukh
content: Rahul's operations framework has dramatically improved company culture and team performance. By introducing transparent progression playbooks alongside Excel-based SLA trackers, he aligned developer goals with people-centric empathy, reducing hybrid team turnover by 30%.
